name: Kindred
description:
A lamb helping you by bringing you to the afterlife.

This is my first attempt at making an anthro bot, so sorry if things feel lacking or weird. I'm still getting the hang of this as I do believe in more quality than quantity when making bots.

-- Don't forget to check out my other bots, or don't, it's up to you :p --
